item.title: PhD Dashboard
item.description: PhD Overview — Intratumoural Microbiome of Oral Cavity SCC Research question Hypothesis Aims Methodology overview Where I am in the PhD Key concepts in this research Selected papers forming the foundation Recent updates This page is part of my public research site.

item.title: Home
item.description: PhD Vault — Intratumoural Microbiome of Oral Cavity SCC My personal research knowledge base. Notes tagged publish: true sync to the public website.

item.title: Laryngectomy Review - Bradley et al
item.description: [@soInfluentialFactorsSurvival2025] In stage 3 LC: Independent analyses of the three treatments did not show statistically significant differences (p > 0.05) Patients who underwent laryngectomy in stage 4 LC were found to have better survival outcomes than those[@soInfluentialFactorsSurvival2025]...

item.title: Welcome
item.description: This is your new vault. Make a note of something, create a link, or try the Importer! When you’re ready, delete this note and make the vault your own.

item.title: SETUP-GUIDE
item.description: Obsidian + Quartz Setup Guide Connecting your vault to jdrizzle-doc21.github.io/PhDcentral/notes What you’re building Your Mac (Obsidian vault) ↓ sync folder GitHub repo: PhDcentral/ ├── index.html ← your existing site ├── dashboard.html ← your existing dashboard └── notes/ ← NEW: Quartz knowledge b...

item.description: Research Notes Welcome to my PhD knowledge base — intratumoural microbiome of oral cavity SCC. Navigate PhD Overview Concepts Paper Summaries .

item.title: Concept 1
item.description: Collection protocol Definition Why this matters to my research Mechanism / how it works Key evidence — Controversies / open questions How I’m applying this Connections This note is part of my PhD knowledge base.
